description_long: This house features a striking modern design with bold geometric patterns in black and white, accented by terracotta-colored gable roofs. The facade is visually dynamic, with alternating horizontal stripes and angular motifs, and includes a prominent entryway with steps and a small green strip. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The structure includes two main stories, with a partially covered balcony and a glass-roofed section at the rear. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of painted concrete, glass, and ceramic roof tiles. The house sits on a raised platform with a striped driveway and landscaped elements.
description: A modern, geometric house with bold black and white patterns, terracotta gable roofs, and large asymmetrical windows. Features include a stepped entry, glass-roofed section, and a striped driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a green strip, bold black and white stripes, and a prominent window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid black and white wall, terracotta roof, and a glass-roofed rear section with visible driveway and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying angular black and white patterns, a glass-roofed patio, and a smaller terracotta roof section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid black wall, glass-roofed area, and striped driveway with green landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Stepped entry with a small green strip, modern door, and bold geometric facade; no porch or columns.
